title: Extract Customer IDs
scenario: Write a SQL query that extracts customer IDs from a database table named 'customers'. The table should have a column named 'id' and another column named 'email'. The query should return a list of customer IDs where the email address is active (i.e., not null). Ensure the query is optimized and has proper syntax.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the query adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the SQL query has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the query correctly extracts the customer IDs from the database table and returns the correct results.
